since_last: 87% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.71%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 87% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.63% · Gold -1.09% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 87% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.71%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.71%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.75%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.75%, CEVA +7.88%, ARM +4.65%, KLAC +4.41%, MRVL +4.34%. Laggards: BABA -0.87%, DV -0.68%, AES -0.41%, OKTA -0.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.45% at $192.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
